skill_execution.question: Who set the fastest lap in qualifying?

sql:
WITH LatestSeason AS (
    SELECT MAX(year) AS latest_year, MAX(season_id) AS latest_season_id
    FROM f1_data_library_DS.public_seasons
),
LatestQualifyingSession AS (
    SELECT
        s.session_id,
        s.session_date,
        r.race_name,
        ls.latest_year
    FROM
        f1_data_library_DS.public_sessions AS s
    JOIN
        f1_data_library_DS.public_races AS r
        ON s.race_id = r.race_id
    JOIN
        LatestSeason AS ls
        ON r.season_id = ls.latest_season_id
    WHERE
        s.session_type = 'Q'
    ORDER BY
        s.session_date DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    dn.full_name,
    dn.driver_code,
    FORMAT("%02d:%02d.%03d",
        FLOOR(l.lap_time_ms / 60000),
        FLOOR(MOD(l.lap_time_ms, 60000) / 1000),
        MOD(l.lap_time_ms, 1000)
    ) AS fastest_lap_time,
    lqs.race_name,
    lqs.latest_year AS year
FROM
    f1_data_library_DS.public_laps AS l
JOIN
    LatestQualifyingSession AS lqs
    ON l.session_id = lqs.session_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_drivers AS pd
    ON l.driver_id = pd.driver_id
JOIN
    f1_data_library_DS.public_driver_number_mapping AS dn
    ON pd.driver_code = dn.driver_code AND dn.season = lqs.latest_year
WHERE
    l.is_deleted = FALSE
ORDER BY
    l.lap_time_ms ASC
LIMIT 1
